rationale: Inline dispatch mode; 7 sections; building under file:// production-fidelity constraint.
6 product sections + integrator + section-7 (edge-case testing). Wave assignment derived from depends_on closure.
App shell + storage adapter + router + event bus. Single builder sufficient for section-1.acceptance — UI-light, no per-mode logic.
Preflop range data: 9 positions x ~80 hands each, hand-graded frequencies.
22 curated postflop hands with full theory, plus 16-term glossary. Exceeds the >=20 hands and >=12 glossary acceptance.
Walkthrough mode + glossary route in one builder. See dev-001 for scope-decomposition deviation.
8 archetypes (TAG, LAG, Nit, CallingStation, Maniac, Rock, Whale, NitReg). Deep-frozen on load to enforce purity.
Pure decide() function with mulberry32 PRNG seeded by stableHash(state) XOR seed; preflop and postflop branches; reads profile but never writes it.
Hand evaluator first (section-5a depends on it). Best-5-of-7, includes wheel straight handling, returns rank+tiebreakers+name.
Table engine: deck/shuffle (mulberry32 seeded), blinds, betting, side pots, showdown via HandEval.
Table UI: 9-seat oval layout, action panel with sizing input + presets, archetype tooltips on click. Auto-advances agent turns via setTimeout 350ms.
Stats writer subscribes to bus events; persists session+all-time under versioned keys; dashboard renders 8 metrics with scope toggle.
All builder outputs copied to output/integration/ via mounted bash. Load order: shell -> data -> archetypes -> agent -> eval -> engine -> mode UIs -> stats.
node --check caught unquoted 'raise_3.5' object key in curated-hands.js h012. Fixed in source and integration copy. See dev-002.json.
All modules load in node with stub DOM/localStorage; chip conservation holds 100/100 hands; hand evaluator correct on royal flush, full house, wheel.
Headless harness exercises 37 assertions; 34 PASS, 0 FAIL, 3 SKIP (browser-only). report.json written. See dev-003, dev-004 for harness fixes.
DAG/contract/writer/OOS/production-fidelity checks all PASS. 6 audit flags appended.
All 7 sections verified; deliverable at output/integration/index.html opens via file:// without network.
